👤 YOU
YOU \u20ac0
Choose your bet to start
\ud83c\udfb2 HEAD-TO-HEAD vs DEALER
The dealer matches every chip you put in. The pot grows with both stakes. Winner takes the whole pot. Big hands earn a bonus on top.
FOLD — surrender the pot; lose your ante
CALL — you add 2× ante, dealer matches 2× ante. Pot = 6× ante
RAISE — you add 3× ante, dealer matches 3× ante. Pot = 8× ante — bigger pot, same odds
If the dealer's hand doesn't qualify (no pair of 4s), your CALL/RAISE bet is refunded.
💰 PAYOUT BONUS (on top of 1.85x base)
Royal Flush +10x
Straight Flush +5x
Four of a Kind +2.5x
Full House +1x
Flush +0.5x
Straight +0.25x
Three of a Kind +0.1x
Two Pair +0.05x

GAMBLER'S RUN
A high-stakes descent. How far do you dare?
⚔️ twin-stick arena👾 14 enemy types🎁 24 power-ups🏛️ beat THE HOUSE
1
Fight — clear the arena waves. Move to dodge, aim to shoot, DASH to escape.
2
Grab the power-up that drops — it stacks and lasts your whole run.
3
Then 3 doors open. Walk into one: win grows your POT, a miss costs a ❤ life, out of lives = BUST.
The fight is just skill — only the door you choose plays for real money. Cash out anytime to bank POT × ante.

Title
Body
WELCOME
GAMBLER BOT
Provably-fair crypto games, live 1v1 duels, and a roguelike where you descend for the big score. Take the quick tour 👇
CASINO
GAMBLER SLOTS
Wilds, Free Spins, the Bonus Wheel and a Vault feature — up to 5000×.
🎡
CASINO
ROULETTE
Place your chips across the table — straight up pays 36×. Classic, fast, ruthless.
FLAGSHIP · GAMBLER'S RUN
FIGHT · BUILD · CASH OUT
A roguelite run for real crypto. Clear rooms of enemies, elites, mini-bosses & bosses in Isaac-style twin-stick combat. Stack 13+ power-ups with deep synergies, spare or execute foes Undertale-style, and loot charms & relics from shops, events & secret rooms. Then drag into a door to gamble deeper — or take the magic hatch and cash out your whole pot. Try dragging into a door:
🃏
CASINO
BLACKJACK
Hit, stand, double — beat the dealer to 21 without busting. Pays up to 2.5×.
♠️
CASINO
POKER
Texas Hold'em against the House. Make the best hand and bank up to 21×.
🚀
CASINO
CRASH
The multiplier climbs… cash out before it crashes. Nerve is everything.
💣
CASINO
TREASURE HUNT
Scratch to uncover prizes — but avoid the bombs. One wrong tile ends it.
1v1 PvP · DUELS
QUICK DUEL: RPS
Challenge real players for the pot. Warm up with Rock-Paper-Scissors vs the bot:
✊
✋

FREE-FOR-ALL · 2–10
🔫
REAL-TIME BATTLE ROYALE
TURF WAR
Drop into the streets with 2–10 gamblers. Grab guns, jack cars and hole up in hideouts while a ring of fire closes in — last one standing takes the whole pot.
RACE · 2–10 DRIVERS
🏁
PROCEDURAL TRACKS
STREET RACE
Circuits that are never the same twice. Drift, boost and lay down trails past 2–10 rivals, customise your ride, and fight for the podium and the pot.
ARENA · 2–8 GLADIATORS
⚔️
FREE-FOR-ALL IN THE SAND
COLOSSEUM
2–8 gladiators, one arena. Sword, shield and perfectly-timed parries decide it — the last fighter standing walks off with the entire pot.
🏆
SCHEDULED EVENTS · REAL PRIZES
TOURNAMENTS
Single-elimination brackets on the multiplayer games — win your lobby, climb the rounds, take the crown and a real prize. Watch any match live as a spectator, train for free against bots, and follow the play-by-play in chat.
🎁
